finding.reason: Top-level runtime truth surfaces are authoritative. Reserve-readiness is secondary, and posture LOCK_HELD is a concurrency/attribution symptom rather than the upstream blocker.
guardrails: clean reread proves current read-surface truth only
clean reread does not authorize a write contour by itself
rotation OK does not waive explicit reserve-first requirement
posture inspect is read-only and not stage-20 proof

notes: Accepted with one refinement: Candidate C was demoted further by the bounded posture reread because the lock symptom did not persist.
